sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT * FROM Sales WHERE ModifiedDate > '2025-01-10 12:00:00' AND ModifiedDate <= '2026-06-08 20:15:00'
SELECT LastWatermarkValue FROM dbo.ControlWatermark WHERE TableName = 'Sales';
SELECT MAX(ModifiedDate) AS NewWatermarkValue FROM dbo.Sales;

text.value: select count(*) as total_count from @{pipeline().parameters.schema}.@{pipeline().parameters.table} where last_updated > '@{if(empty(pipeline().parameters.backdate),activity('lkp_cdc').output.value[0].cdc_timestamp,pipeline().parameters.backdate)}'
